Manage Your Award
Manage Your Award
This section includes resources to help you understand how your contract or grant will be administered, including how to process your invoices for payments.
Image
Manage Your Contract Award
The Office of Naval Research provides resources for award recipients to manage their contracts.
Image
Manage Your Grant Award
Information for grant recipients about managing grants, including how to access grants and the grant payment process.
Image
Administration Lookup
The Office of Naval Research has an Indirect Cost Branch and five business offices that carry out award administration, indirect cost rate negotiations, business system reviews and quality assurance responsibilities.
